# submitit hard: root wrapper and LocalExecutor job

Wrap the `submitit` package root, retain executor entry points plus `helpers.run_cmd`, and use a checked-in script to run a real `LocalExecutor` job.

## Why This Case Exists

A harder submitit challenge should prove both broader package-root discovery and a deeper real submission workflow than the DebugExecutor rung.

## Case Shape

- ID: `submitit_hard`
- Family: `submitit`
- Difficulty: `hard`
- Tier: `local_full`
- Style: `package`
- Workflow Slice: `hpc`
- Target Kind: `package`
- Upstream Target: `submitit`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/submitit_hard/challenge.toml`

## Ingestion Breadth

- Minimum generated tools: `20`
- Required generated tools: `helpers__run_cmd`, `create_auto_executor`, `create_debug_executor`, `create_local_executor`, `local_executor_update_parameters`

## Why This Stays A Challenge

This case keeps its ingestion recipe and workflow assertions in
`challenge.toml` instead of checking in companion `ingest.py` and
`use.py` scripts. That boundary is intentional: the challenge lane
should stay a compact problem statement rather than turning into a
worked answer key like the real-world example lane.

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=submitit_hard
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only submitit_hard
```

## Prepared Inputs

- Render `challenges/cases/submitit_hard/fixtures/run_local_job.py` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/run_local_job.py` before the workflow runs.

## Fixtures

- `challenges/cases/submitit_hard/fixtures/run_local_job.py`

## Workflow

### 1. Launch the checked-in LocalExecutor helper script through the root facade

Tool: `helpers__run_cmd`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "args": [
    [
      "{python_executable}",
      "{challenge_artifact_dir}/run_local_job.py",
      "{challenge_artifact_dir}"
    ]
  ],
  "kwargs": {
    "cwd": "{challenge_artifact_dir}"
  }
}
```

Expectations: text contains ['6']; files are non-empty ['{challenge_artifact_dir}/local_summary.json', '{challenge_artifact_dir}/local_files.txt'].

## What This Case Proves

- Package-root ingestion can retain both executor classes and helper functions from submitit in one shot.
- The generated facade can launch a script that performs a real `LocalExecutor` submission and waits for the result.
- The retained artifacts show the local job outputs instead of hiding the execution path.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: broaden submitit ingestion from the package root while launching a real LocalExecutor job.
# This hard rung proves both wider wrapper breadth and a real queued local job workflow.
id = "submitit_hard"
title = "submitit hard: root wrapper and LocalExecutor job"
tier = "local_full"
style = "package"
slice = "hpc"
family = "submitit"
difficulty = "hard"

[example]
summary = "Wrap the `submitit` package root, retain executor entry points plus `helpers.run_cmd`, and use a checked-in script to run a real `LocalExecutor` job."
motivation = "A harder submitit challenge should prove both broader package-root discovery and a deeper real submission workflow than the DebugExecutor rung."
proves = [
  "Package-root ingestion can retain both executor classes and helper functions from submitit in one shot.",
  "The generated facade can launch a script that performs a real `LocalExecutor` submission and waits for the result.",
  "The retained artifacts show the local job outputs instead of hiding the execution path.",
]

[target]
kind = "package"
value = "submitit"

[probe]
imports = ["submitit"]

[scaffold]
kind = "package"
include_submodules = true
symbol_include_patterns = ["^AutoExecutor$", "^DebugExecutor$", "^LocalExecutor$", "^run_cmd$"]
max_generated_tools = 24

[setup]
[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/run_local_job.py"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/run_local_job.py"

[ingestion]
min_generated_tools = 20
required_tools = [
  "helpers__run_cmd",
  "create_auto_executor",
  "create_debug_executor",
  "create_local_executor",
  "local_executor_update_parameters",
]

[workflow]
[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Launch the checked-in LocalExecutor helper script through the root facade"
tool = "helpers__run_cmd"
arguments = { args = [["{python_executable}", "{challenge_artifact_dir}/run_local_job.py", "{challenge_artifact_dir}"]], kwargs = { cwd = "{challenge_artifact_dir}" } }

[workflow.steps.expect]
text_contains = ["6"]
files_nonempty = [
  "{challenge_artifact_dir}/local_summary.json",
  "{challenge_artifact_dir}/local_files.txt",
]
```
